response.justification: While the candidate clears the 15-year experience bar and brings genuine breadth across web, embedded, and infrastructure work, the role demands recognized AI expertise and director-level strategic advisory capability. The candidate's AI involvement is recent and limited to tooling at a small firm, with no published research, notable AI products, or evidence of advising customers or partners on cloud/AI strategy at scale. The seniority profile — Staff/Senior Developer across mid-size companies — does not map to the Director-level IC scope the role requires.
strengths: ~20 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Founder and open-source maintainer experience (GISCollective) demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative
Recent work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq shows emerging AI engagement
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent; no recognized AI products, publications, or thought leadership at the level the role demands
No advanced degree (Master's/PhD in AI preferred); Bachelor's only
No evidence of strategic advisory, customer-facing technical leadership, or director-level scope

key_factors.factor: Missing advanced degree and strategic IC experience
